commit_scope: Fix agent memory loop invariants exposed by prompt-gate API tests, and reduce one resonance scoring long function so the maintainability guard returns to baseline instead of accepting higher drift.

commands: cd api && ruff check app/services/memory_service.py app/services/belief_service.py
python3 -m venv api/.venv && api/.venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && api/.venv/bin/python -m pip install -e 'api[dev]'

deploy_validation.details: Public deploy verification failed before this branch shipped because API /api/health reported deployed_sha c85727dcf3ae5418e88305e18e542965fc422aba while /api/gates/main-head reported 5061fef6d3ba1836ce2e7db08de586ccd5e387b8.

phase_gate.blocked_reason: CI is pending for this branch and the public API was already behind main during audit.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Agent memory recall remains synthesized without timestamp-like text, and consolidation reports output_token_estimate lower than input_token_estimate for same-kind moment groups.
test_flows: Create a memory moment and recall it; synthesis contains no timestamp-like capital T leakage.
Create six same-kind moments and consolidate; archived source moments preserve provenance while output token estimate is smaller than input token estimate.
Recall after consolidation; earned conclusions still include the consolidated kind label.
Compute contributor-to-idea belief resonance and confirm the extracted scoring helpers preserve the same response breakdown.
